sb_prompt: FIND OUT WHAT CRITERIA THE OTHER CALLER WOULD USE IN SELECTING CHILD CARE SERVICES FOR A PRESCHOOLER.  IS IT EASY OR DIFFICULT TO FIND SUCH CARE?
raw_output:
Participants: Participta (P) and Participanta (S)

P: Hi there, I was wondering if you could help me out with something. I need to find child care services for my preschooler, but I don't really know where to start. Do you happen to have any experience or advice on this matter?

S: Sure, I can definitely help you out. Have you thought about what kind of criteria are important to you when selecting a child care service?
P
